acceptanceCriteria: Audio source is connected to an AnalyserNode

tests.name: analyser has expected fftSize
acceptanceCriteria: Audio source is connected to an AnalyserNode

tests.name: getFrequencyData returns Uint8Array of correct length
acceptanceCriteria: Frequency data is readable per frame

tests.name: getTimeDomainData returns Uint8Array of correct length
acceptanceCriteria: Time-domain data is readable per frame

tests.name: does not access localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookies

tests.name: poll() populates frequency and timeDomain buffers in place
acceptanceCriteria: Frequency data is readable per frame
Time-domain data is readable per frame

tests.name: poll() returns the same buffer references on every call (no per-frame allocation)
acceptanceCriteria: Frequency data is readable per frame
Time-domain data is readable per frame

tests.name: poll() is callable multiple times simulating per-frame usage
acceptanceCriteria: Frequency data is readable per frame
Time-domain data is readable per frame

tests.name: pipeline works independently of gain/mute state
acceptanceCriteria: Mute state does not disable analysis

tests.name: pipeline does not access localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookies
initAudio resolves without throwing when play() succeeds
acceptanceCriteria: Audio source is connected to an AnalyserNode

tests.name: initAudio resolves without throwing when play() rejects (autoplay blocked)
acceptanceCriteria: Audio source is connected to an AnalyserNode

tests.name: initial state is muted
acceptanceCriteria: Mute state does not disable analysis

tests.name: gain is set to 0 before play() is called
acceptanceCriteria: Mute state does not disable analysis

tests.name: state is 'playing' when autoplay succeeds
state is 'suspended' when autoplay is blocked
setMuted(false) sets gain to 1 and calls ctx.resume()
acceptanceCriteria: Mute state does not disable analysis

tests.name: setMuted(true) sets gain to 0
acceptanceCriteria: Mute state does not disable analysis

tests.name: setMuted(false) updates muted property to false
getAnalyserNode returns an AnalyserNode
acceptanceCriteria: Audio source is connected to an AnalyserNode

does not use localStorage, sessionStorage, or cookies
audio graph allows analysis while muted

summary.notes: All tests already exist and pass. The test suite covers the AnalyserPipeline (pre-allocated buffers, poll() method, zero-allocation per-frame reads) and player-level pipeline integration (getPipeline(), muted/suspended state resilience). No new tests needed.
